creator: Agent Buildprint
title: AI Swarm Simulator
summary: A MiroFish-inspired graph-backed swarm simulation workbench Buildprint with a polished clickable UX, open-source graph memory, dynamic LLM providers, simulation runtime, report generation, and interaction loop.
plainDescription: Rebuild the spirit of MiroFish as a trusted-local product workbench: upload seed material, generate and inspect a graph, run a swarm simulation, generate a grounded report, and continue interacting with the simulated world. The packet replaces Zep Cloud with an open-source graph-memory adapter path and keeps LLM providers dynamic through OpenAI-compatible configuration.
promise: Build a high-craft MiroFish-style AI swarm/social simulation workbench with source upload, ontology, real graph canvas inspection, open graph memory, provider-neutral LLM setup, simulation traces, grounded reports, durable state, and honest blockers.
whatYouGet: Executable Buildprint packet with canonical BUILDPRINT.md start
UI/UX-finesse README for humans browsing the GitHub packet
Open-source graph-memory replacement requirement for Zep Cloud
Anti-slop review against dead controls, fake graphs, canned reports, and generic dashboard drift
whatYouNeed: LLM provider credentials for live AI proof, or honest blocked-provider state
Open-source graph-memory runtime or adapter stub with exact blocker
Browser/e2e review path for the workbench loop
risks: Flattening MiroFish into a generic dashboard
Treating a static graph image as the graph workbench
Leaving Zep Cloud as a hidden dependency
Shipping canned reports or fake simulation output
Dead controls and placeholder states presented as complete
Claiming durable state that only lives in memory
checks: Live agb start can bootstrap exact snapshots
README sets the UX craft floor
Final review rejects dead controls, fake graphs, canned reports, and dashboard drift

trustBadges.label: UX craft floor
trustBadges.detail: Requires a polished clickable workbench, not a generic dashboard.

trustBadges.label: Open graph memory
trustBadges.detail: Requires an open-source replacement path for Zep Cloud.

trustBadges.label: Anti-slop review
trustBadges.detail: Final review checks fake graphs, dead controls, canned reports, and placeholder UX.

publicStatus.label: v4 product packet
publicStatus.explanation: Consumer-First product Buildprint remapped from MiroFish with explicit UX craft floor, open graph-memory replacement, and dynamic LLM provider boundaries.

copyPrompt: Use the AI Swarm Simulator Buildprint remapped from https://github.com/666ghj/MiroFish. First bootstrap exact snapshots: agb start https://agent-buildprint.com/buildprints/ai-swarm-simulator/package.json . If agb is not installed, clone https://github.com/DomEscobar/agent-buildprint and run node agent-buildprint/bin/agb.js start https://agent-buildprint.com/buildprints/ai-swarm-simulator/package.json . Then read .buildprint/next-agent.md and continue. Do not write Buildprint snapshots manually. Preserve the sleek Canva-like motion/clickable MiroFish UX, replace Zep Cloud with a free open-source graph-memory adapter, and make LLM provider configuration dynamic/OpenAI-compatible.
